title: Why didnt Rei appear to Asuka in EoE
display_title: Why didnt Rei appear to Asuka in EoE
wikitext:
[]: Why didn't Rei appear to Asuka in EoE?             Quote Post by HENRCAST » Mon Oct 06, 2008 1:54 pm Rei appears to all characters just before they die and/or just after they turn into LCL in EoE. But she never appears to Asuka. If Asuka really died and turned into LCL why didn't Rei appear to her?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Oct 06, 2008 2:02 pm she technically died before instrumentality started so there was no need for Rei to appear to her. Her soul was already freed of her body so she and the others like Misato and ritsuko who had died just before instrumentality were able to be a part of it

[]:             Quote Post by HENRCAST » Mon Oct 06, 2008 2:05 pm Well, Rei appeared to Misato just before she exploded, and so did she appear to Ritsuko before Instrumentality began...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 06, 2008 2:09 pm It simply isn't shown. Perhaps because Asuka's body would have been a bloody mess. Her appearance before both Misato and Ritsuko the moment before their deaths would imply she also appeared before Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Oct 06, 2008 2:14 pm true, good point

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 06, 2008 2:26 pm The form in which Rei appeared to Asuka would remove all the ambiguity from the rest of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 06, 2008 3:21 pm ^ Too true. And if it helps any, one of the S2 Works pieces IS entitled Asuka's death.... Perhaps Anno was going to show Asuka's demise but then scrapped the idea for whatever reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Oct 06, 2008 3:35 pm _

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 06, 2008 3:38 pm People have different sides to them and the point of (Pre)-Instrumentality with EoE is to show how the characters can snap just like anybody else can. Hope that helps somewhat.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Oct 06, 2008 3:43 pm I guess it's just easiest to assume that they're all really "there." About Misato, I think I can answer my own question. She doesn't say much in P3II, because Shinji doesn't really care what she has to say.

[]:             Quote Post by Silent Lightning » Mon Oct 06, 2008 4:55 pm I know I'm going off on a tangent, but in what form do you think Rei appeared to Ritsuko at her death?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 06, 2008 5:11 pm what do you mean "form"?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Oct 06, 2008 5:15 pm she only appeared in different forms to people who were alive as a form that would calm them in order for them to let down their at fileds (however aoba seems to be an exception)

[]:             Quote Post by HENRCAST » Mon Oct 06, 2008 5:16 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The form in which Rei appeared to Asuka would remove all the ambiguity from the rest of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Oct 06, 2008 5:29 pm or maybe he really loved the reiquarium ...and shares Shinji's fear of displaying attraction towards women who are conscious?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Oct 06, 2008 6:19 pm NemZ wrote: fear of displaying attraction towards women who are conscious?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Oct 06, 2008 6:42 pm Lucretius wrote: And there's a clear discrepancy between Misato's calm "Yes, this is also me," and her anguished "No, don't show this to Shinji!" in 25.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Oct 06, 2008 6:47 pm Good points. Thanks, thewayneiac.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 06, 2008 7:32 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: And if it helps any, one of the S2 Works pieces IS entitled Asuka's death....
